restrictedZones.name: LPU Front Gate — Traffic Danger Zone
restrictedZones.description: Extremely high traffic on GT Road at LPU gate. Highway vehicles + student pedestrians = frequent accidents. High risk for women walking alone at night.

restrictedZones.name: Law Gate Market — High Risk (Women)
restrictedZones.description: Crowded evening market outside LPU. Pickpocketing, eve teasing, and bag snatching reported. Women advised not to walk alone here after 8 PM.

restrictedZones.name: LPU Back Gate — Isolated Night Road
restrictedZones.description: Poorly lit service road behind LPU. Very isolated after 10 PM. Multiple harassment incidents reported. Avoid alone at night.

restrictedZones.name: Khajurla Village Road
restrictedZones.description: Narrow unlit road from LPU toward Khajurla. No streetlights after sunset. Used as student shortcut but highly unsafe. No emergency services nearby.

restrictedZones.name: Haveli Khajurla Crossroads
restrictedZones.description: Remote intersection near Haveli Khajurla. Vehicle theft and robbery incidents reported after dark. Avoid after 9 PM.

restrictedZones.name: Haveli Village Inner Roads
restrictedZones.description: Deserted village lanes around Haveli area west of LPU. Poorly lit, no police presence. Avoid walking alone here.

restrictedZones.name: Kajrula Road — Unlit Stretch
restrictedZones.description: Dark isolated road toward Kajrula from LPU area. Known for bike theft and lone-traveler incidents at night. No CCTV coverage.

restrictedZones.name: Khajurla Fields Road
restrictedZones.description: Agricultural road near Khajurla passing through open fields. Completely isolated after dark. Multiple incidents of harassment reported near this stretch.

restrictedZones.name: LPU West Boundary Road
restrictedZones.description: Road running along the western edge of LPU campus. Poorly lit, limited CCTV. Isolated stretches used by motorcycle riders at speed at night.

restrictedZones.name: GT Road (NH44) — Night Danger Zone
restrictedZones.description: High-speed highway LPU to Phagwara. Rash driving frequent at night. Women should never walk alone on this stretch after 9 PM.

restrictedZones.name: Rurka Kalan Highway Stretch
restrictedZones.description: Unlit section of NH44 near Rurka Kalan. Unmarked speed bumps and stray animals cause accidents after 9 PM.

restrictedZones.name: LPU–Phagwara GT Road Stretch
restrictedZones.description: Intermediate stretch of GT Road between LPU and Phagwara. Frequent overspeeding, no pedestrian pathway. Multiple road accident hotspot.

restrictedZones.name: Chaheru Railway Crossing
restrictedZones.description: Dimly lit crossing and station area. Isolated after 10 PM. Harassment incidents near the crossing. Arrange transport instead of walking here at night.

restrictedZones.name: Phagwara Railway Station
restrictedZones.description: Busy transit hub. Active theft and scams targeting travelers. Women traveling alone should stay in well-lit areas and use official transport.

restrictedZones.name: Phagwara City Market
restrictedZones.description: Congested commercial lanes. Bag snatching, motorcycle theft, and eve teasing incidents. Avoid alone in the evening.

restrictedZones.name: Phagwara Industrial Area — Night Zone
restrictedZones.description: Industrial outskirts with minimal foot traffic after 11 PM. Vehicle theft and robbery reported. Women should not be here alone at night.

restrictedZones.name: Jalandhar Bus Stand (SBS ISBT)
restrictedZones.description: Major bus terminal with active pickpockets and luggage thieves. High risk for solo female travelers. Extra vigilance during boarding.

restrictedZones.name: Rama Mandi Chowk, Jalandhar
restrictedZones.description: Chaotic intersection. High accident rate and chain snatching near the chowk. Be alert, especially on two-wheelers.

restrictedZones.name: Jyoti Chowk Market, Jalandhar
restrictedZones.description: Dense market. Pickpocketing in crowded lanes. Women report frequent eve teasing in narrow alleys. Avoid isolated lanes here.

restrictedZones.name: Model Town Market, Jalandhar
restrictedZones.description: Crowded weekend market. Car break-ins and snatching near parking areas. Guard valuables.

restrictedZones.name: Jalandhar Cantt Station Area
restrictedZones.description: Surroundings become deserted on late-night trains. Exercise caution if arriving or departing after midnight.

restrictedZones.name: Kapurthala Road — Isolated Stretch
restrictedZones.description: Poorly lit and low-traffic sections between Jalandhar and Kapurthala at night. Avoid traveling alone after dark.

restrictedZones.name: Nakodar Town Centre
restrictedZones.description: Narrow lanes and high footfall during market hours. Pickpocketing during festive season. Generally safe in daylight.

restrictedZones.name: LPU Main Gate Pedestrian Crossing
restrictedZones.description: GT Road crossing directly at LPU main gate. Extremely dangerous for pedestrians — vehicles rarely stop. Multiple student accident fatalities recorded here.

restrictedZones.name: LPU Side Road toward Haveli
restrictedZones.description: Road branching from LPU toward Haveli area. Gets very dark after 9 PM. Students returning late from Phagwara or Law Gate area should avoid this route alone.
